channel.title: News on FEBUS lab
channel.description: Recent content in News on FEBUS lab

item.title: Exciting research opportunity in the FEBUS Lab!
item.description: Fully Funded Research Internships in Canada.

item.title: Congratulation Ahnaaf!
item.description: Congratulations to Ahnaaf Khan for completing his 4 months summer internship as Course Content Develper in the FEBUS Lab.

item.title: FLAQ was big at TIM 2025
item.description: The FLuid Alliance at Queen’s (FLAQ) had a strong presence at the 2025 Thousand Islands Fluid Dynamics Meeting (TIM Fluids).
